src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Add Schema annotation to hide the BearerToken parameter from the generated OpenAPI documentation.
Introduce a configurable attribute to control exception throwing behavior for the BearerToken annotation.
Add a 'profiles' attribute to the annotation to allow specifying allowed profiles directly.
Add a 'filterJwt' attribute to the annotation to control JWT filtering behavior.
Expand Javadoc to document new attributes and reference related classes.
Import HttpServletUtils to access the current HTTP request context.
Override getPath() to dynamically retrieve the request URI from the current HTTP context if the path field is null.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: public String getPath() { if (path == null) { var request = HttpServletUtils.getRequest().orElse(null); if (request != null) { return request.getRequestURI(); } } return ""; }

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Register custom converters for API endpoint name types to handle serialization and deserialization in MongoDB.
Introduce a new AuditorAware bean that returns ObjectId instead of String to support auditing fields of type ObjectId.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: public AuditorAware<ObjectId> auditorObjectIdProvider() { ... return Optional.of(new ObjectId(...)); }

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Remove the @Primary annotation from the String-based auditor provider to allow the new ObjectId provider to take precedence or coexist without conflict.
Enrich the OpenAPI info section with contact details, terms of service, and a summary.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: contact = @Contact(name = "Inlaco", email = "sontungexpt@gmail.com"), termsOfService = "https://inlaco.com/terms", summary = "Inlaco Service API"

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Define a specific logout endpoint programmatically in the OpenAPI configuration to ensure it appears in the documentation with correct security requirements.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: @Bean public OpenAPI customOpenAPI() { return new OpenAPI()... .path("/api/v1/logout", new PathItem()...)

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Uncomment the entire Redis configuration class to enable Redis integration in the application.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: Removed leading '// ' from package declaration, imports, annotations, and class body.

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Correct the package declaration to match the actual project structure.
Switch AuthenticationManager bean to use AuthenticationConfiguration.getAuthenticationManager() instead of manually constructing ProviderManager, aligning with modern Spring Security practices.
Replace deprecated setAllowedOrigins with addAllowedOriginPattern for wildcard origin support in CORS configuration.
Enable CSRF protection with CookieCsrfTokenRepository and ignore specific request matchers, replacing the previous disabled CSRF state.
Refactor authorizeHttpRequests to iterate over HTTP methods and use a unified getPublicSecurityPaths method for cleaner permission mapping.
Add necessary imports for Arrays, Slf4j, AuthenticationConfiguration, and CookieCsrfTokenRepository to support the refactored code.
Add @Slf4j annotation to SecurityConfig class to enable logging capabilities.
Remove unused imports for AuthenticationProvider and ProviderManager as they are no longer used in the bean definitions.
Add a getData method returning null to BaseException to provide a default implementation for exception data payloads.
Add a new constructor that accepts only a message to handle cases where the token is not available.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: public JwtTokenException(String message) { super(HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED, message); this.tokenType = TokenType.BEARER; this.token = ""; }

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Refactor the existing two-argument constructor to delegate to a new three-argument constructor (implied by the call to this(TokenType.BEARER, token, message)) for code reuse.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: public JwtTokenException(String token, String message) { this(TokenType.BEARER, token, message); }

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Refactor exception fields from single conflict item to a map to support multiple conflicting fields.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: private Map<String, Object> conflictFields = new HashMap<>();

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Add constructor overloads accepting a Map of conflict fields instead of a single field name/value pair.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: public <T> ResourceAlreadyInUseException(Class<T> resource, Map<String, Object> conflictFields)

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Override getData to expose the conflict fields map for API response serialization.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: return new Object() { public Map<String, Object> getConflictFields() { return conflictFields; } };

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Correct the HTTP status code from CONFLICT to NOT_FOUND to accurately reflect the exception's purpose.
Update the error message template from 'already in use' to 'not found' to match the new status code and intent.
Replace individual field/value fields with a Map to support multiple conflict fields dynamically.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: private Map<String, Object> conflictFields = new HashMap<>();

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Add a new constructor that accepts a Map of conflict fields directly.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: public <T> ResourceNotFoundException(Class<T> resource, Map<String, Object> conflictFields)

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Add a new constructor that accepts a message, resource class, and Map of conflict fields.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: public <T> ResourceNotFoundException(String message, @NonNull Class<T> resource, Map<String, Object> conflictFields)

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Override getData() to expose the conflict fields map in the exception response.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.human_impl: @Override public Object getData() { return new Object() { public Map<String, Object> getConflictFields() { return conflictFields; } }; }
